auth.sub: Enter your email and we'll send you a secure sign-in code — no password needed.
auth.codePlaceholder: Enter the code from your email
auth.tip: Tip: you can also just tap the link in the same email. Entering the code here keeps you signed in inside the installed app.
auth.newHere: New here? Enter your email to request access — an administrator approves new users before their first sign-in. By continuing you accept that this is a guide only and you are responsible for obeying local fishing laws.
region.title: Your region
region.desc: Catch Local shows the legal catch rules for your region. We detect your region automatically, or choose it below.
lang.label: Language
app.tagline: An FM8 Pty Ltd application · Local seafood & recreational catch rules
id.title: 📷 Identify your catch
search.title: 🔎 Look up a species
search.desc: Search by name to read the current catch rules.
catches.title: 🐟 Community catches
share.title: Share your catch
share.sub: Region only by default — your exact spot is never shared unless you add it to a private link.
share.name: Show your name as (optional)
share.gps: Include my exact GPS spot in the private link
share.viewsub: A catch shared with you via Catch Local
sugg.link: 💡 Suggest an improvement or report a problem
sugg.title: Suggest an improvement
sugg.desc: Spotted a wrong rule, a missing species, or have an idea? Tell us.
admin.title: 🛡️ Admin — user management
meas.title: Measure from a photo
meas.sub: An estimate to help you spot a borderline fish — always confirm with a real measure before keeping it.
meas.ref: Reference object (something of known size in the photo)
meas.add: 📷 Add photo of the fish + reference
share.notesPh: e.g. on the run-out tide, gold lure
support.title: Help build Catch Local
support.intro: Catch Local is free. Its hardest job is keeping the rules current across 53 regions — when a regulator changes a size or bag limit, someone has to catch it.
support.waysTitle: Ways to help — no money needed
support.wayRules: Spotted a rule that looks out of date or wrong? Tell us — this is the single most valuable thing you can do.
support.wayPhotos: Add a photo of a species you've caught. Open any species and choose “Add a photo of this species”.
support.wayTranslate: Speak another language? Help check or improve a translation.
support.reportBtn: Report a rule or send a suggestion
support.moneyIntro: Contributions cover hosting, the species photo library, and the work of re-checking rules when regulators update them.
support.notDeductible: Catch Local is made by FM8 Pty Ltd, a company — so this is support, not a charitable donation, and it is not tax deductible. Nothing is unlocked or withheld either way: the app is the same for everyone.
support.soon: Payment options are being set up — in the meantime, reporting an out-of-date rule helps more than you'd think.
